items.name_en: [Size Change Chip Version] Model: M12109 Small This style is double-sided and highly versatile. A legendary Neverfull BB bag that always meets your tote needs. Spacious yet not bulky, structured yet soft, perfect for home or travel. Tighten the side drawstrings to instantly transform into a chic city bag. Loosen them to revert to a stylish and practical tote. The long leather handle is suitable for shoulder or arm carry. Shown here in Damier Azur canvas. Dimensions: 24x19x9cm

items.name_en: [Top-tier Original Box] Gucci Horsebit 1955 Small Shoulder Bag. The new 1955 series reimagines the Gucci Horsebit 1955 Small Shoulder Bag, combining versatility with practicality. Crafted from classic beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, the zip closure and adjustable shoulder strap add depth to the design. Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, gold-tone hardware, cotton-linen blend lining, horsebit detail. Inside: 1 card slot, external pocket, adjustable shoulder strap (55cm high). Zip closure.
items.name_cn:

items.name_en: [With full counter green packaging]!!️ GG Marmont leather double-fold wallet, Gucci continues to update colors with more refined tones. In new colorways and combinations, the brand reinterprets the classic GG Marmont collection with a modern perspective. This double-fold wallet is crafted from forest green leather, with brand identity accessories presented in palladium tone. Forest green leather, palladium tone accessories, double G, eight card slots, two bill compartments.
